64.reason: Error: This loop reads the second polynomial incorrectly. The input format specifies that the second polynomial is read in the same way as the first (ending with a newline), but this loop reads until EOF, which will cause incorrect input handling or an infinite loop if the input ends with a newline. It should use the same do-while pattern with a character check for newline.
